title: Amit Shah Lambasts Mamata Banerjee Over Women's Safety In West Bengal
description: Intensifying his attack on Banerjee, Shah remarked, "Just now, I was watching a speech of Mamata Didi. She was scaring the majority community here, saying that if TMC isn't there, the majority community won't survive. During their rule, there were riots in Murshidabad, attacks on Ram Navami, a ban on Saraswati Puja - where had she gone then?"
